name: session-scheduler
description: File-backed workflows, reviewer routing, and task tracking for multi-pane Codex orchestration over session-chat (>=0.13.0).

interface.shortDescription: Track and assign tasks across named Codex panes.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight file-backed task ledger layered on session-chat for orchestrator, executor, and reviewer workflows.
defaultPrompt: Assign a task to a named pane.
